<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=304015757 space=SYSML2P version=1 -->
## PAGE 00041: (2026x Refresh1) Creating custom tabular view definitions

- page_id: `304015757`
- space_key: `SYSML2P`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/SYSML2P/pages/304015757/2026x+Refresh1+Creating+custom+tabular+view+definitions
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2026-05-06T22:17:43.826+02:00`
- ancestors: Versions of SysML v2 Plugin Documentation > (2026x Refresh1) SysML v2 Plugin Documentation > (2026x Refresh1) Model composition > (2026x Refresh1) Views > (2026x Refresh1) Creating views > (2026x Refresh1) Tabular views > (2026x Refresh1) Custom tabular view definitions
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

Instead of, or in addition to, using the predefined tabular view definitions, you can create model-based custom tabular view definitions as part of your projects.There are two ways you can do that:

- Reuse predefined or custom tabular view definitions
- Create new customized tabular view definitions from scratch

Afterward, you can create individual view usages defined by the newly created tabular view definitions.

##### Creating custom tabular view definitions

###### Creating a custom tabular view definition

To create a custom tabular view definition

1. In the Containment tree, [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Managing elements' space=''] with a [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Package' space=''] .
2. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Managing Textual Editor' space=''] for the new package and do one of the following:
  1. To create a new custom tabular view definition from scratch:
    1. Declare a view definition, specify its name, and subclassify the Base Table view definition from the DS_Views::CoreViews package.
  2. To create a new custom tabular view definition by reusing an existing tabular view definition (predefined or custom):
    1. Declare a view definition, specify its name, and subclassify the needed tabular view definition.
3. Within the body of the view definition, declare the keywords*render rendering*, (optionally) specify the name for the element,**and r edefine the inherited renderer. Since all standard predefined tabular view definitions use the *DS_Views::CoreViews::asTable***renderer, redefine the inherited *asTable* renderer for any new custom tabular view definitions created from scratch or those reusing predefined tabular view definitions.For a new custom tabular view definition that reuses a custom-created tabular view definition, check what its renderer is.
4. Click the Synchronize button. Proceed to .

The new view definition becomes available in the[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Custom View Creation dialog' space=''] once you:

1. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Custom View Creation dialog' space=''].
2. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Creating View Creation dialog' space=''].
3. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Creating View Creation dialog' space=''] .

// ---------- view definitions

// a new view definition created from scratch:

viewdef'System Behavior Table':>DS_Views::CoreViews::bt{renderrenderingasNewTable1:>>asTable;}

// a new view definition created by reusing a predefined view definition *Generic Table*:

viewdef'System Components Taxonomy Table':> DS_Views::TabularViews::gt{ 
renderrenderingasNewTable2:>>asTable;

}

// a new view definition created by reusing a custom-created view definition 'System Behavior Table':

viewdef'Variant Table':> 'System Behavior Table'{ 
renderrenderingasNewTable3:>> asNewTable1;// *asNewTable3*redefines the *'System Behavior Table'* view definition's *asNewTable1* rendering, which itself redefines the *Base Table*view definition's *asTable* rendering

}

##### Adding table columns

For more information, see the [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Tabular view columns' space=''] table on the [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Tabular view columns' space=''] page.

###### Adding table columns by feature

If you need to modify inherited columns by feature instead of creating new ones, see the procedure.

To add table columns by feature

1. Within the body of the renderer, declare a view, specify the column name, define it by *DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByFeatureView*, and subset *column*.
2. Within the column view's body, declare *ref item*, redefine *columnFeature*, and specify the expression for the targeted meta-feature or user-defined feature.
3. Click the Synchronize button.

#### SECTION: Targeting user-defined features

#### COLUMN: Alternative notation

50%

#### PANEL: Alternative notation

Targeting meta-features

package'Custom Tabular View Definitions'{ 
viewdefCustomTabularViewDefinition:>DS_Views::CoreViews::bt{ // a view reusing *Base Table*, which does not have any columns to be inherited from 
renderrendering:>>asTable{ 
view'Declared Name':DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByFeatureView:>column{ // new column 
refitem:>>columnFeature=declaredNamemetaKerML::Core::Feature; // targets *Declared Name* 
} 
view'Declared Short Name':DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByFeatureView:>column{ // new column 
refitem:>>columnFeature=declaredShortNamemetaKerML::Core::Feature; // targets *Declared Short Name* 
} 
viewDocumentation:DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByFeatureView:>column{ // new column 
refitem:>>columnFeature=documentationmetaKerML::Core::Feature; // targets *Documentation* 
} 
view'Qualified Name':DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByFeatureView:>column{ // new column 
refitem:>>columnFeature=qualifiedNamemetaKerML::Core::Feature;// targets *Qualified Name* 
} 
viewOwner:DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByFeatureView:>column{ // new column 
refitem:>>columnFeature=ownermetaKerML::Core::Feature; // targets *Owner* 
} 
} 
} 
}

#### EXPAND: Alternative notation

Alternative notation

// the following expressions are equivalent: 
refitem:>>columnFeature=declaredShortNamemetaKerML::Core::Feature; 
refitem:>>columnFeature=declaredShortName.metadata as KerML::Core::Feature;

#### COLUMN: Targeting user-defined features

50%

#### PANEL: Targeting user-defined features

Targeting user-defined features

packageSecurityStructure{ 
privateimportScalarValues::*; 
metadatadefApproval{// custom metadata definition 
attributeapproved:Boolean; 
attributeapprover:String; 
}partdefSecurityDesign{// element with applied custom metadata 
@Approval{ 
:>>approved=true; 
:>>approver="John Smith"; 
} 
} 
}

package'Custom Tabular View Definitions'{ 
viewdefCustomTabularViewDefinition:>DS_Views::CoreViews::bt{ 
renderrendering:>>asTable{ 
view:DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByFeatureView:>column{// new column 
refitem:>>columnFeature=SecurityStructure::Approval::approved.metadata; // targets the value of the 'approved' attribute of the custom metadata 'Approval' 
} 
view:DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByFeatureView:>column{// new column 
refitem:>>columnFeature=SecurityStructure::Approval::approver.metadata; // targets the value of the 'approver' attribute of the custom metadata 'Approval' 
} 
} 
} 
}

###### [IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Adding table columns by expression

To add table columns by expression

1. Within the body of the renderer, declare a view, specify the element name, define it by *DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByExpressionView*, and subset *column*.
2. Within the column view's body, d eclarethe keywords*render rendering*, specify the name for the element, define it by the needed cell rendering definition, and redefine *DS_Views::CoreViews::asTableCell*. If you do not define *asTableCell* by a cell rendering definition, it is considered as defined by the *StringCellRendering*cell rendering definition by default.The available table cell rendering can be found in the *CoreViews* package.Click here to view themrenderingdefBooleanCellRendering:> TableCellRendering; 
renderingdefElementCellRendering:> TableCellRendering; 
renderingdefEnumCellRendering:> TableCellRendering; 
renderingdefIntegerCellRendering:> TableCellRendering; 
renderingdefMetaobjectCellRendering:> TableCellRendering; 
renderingdefRealCellRendering:> TableCellRendering; 
renderingdefStringCellRendering:> TableCellRendering;rendering def TableCellRendering { 
 calc getValue { in rowElement [0..1] : Metaobjects::Metaobject; } 
 attribute isMultiValued [0..1] : ScalarValues::Boolean; 
 }
3. Within the body of the rendering, declare a calculation and redefine *getValue*. Specify the *in* direction, redefine the *rowElement*. Specify the needed expression. See the example below.
4. Click the Synchronize button.

package'Custom Tabular View Definitions'{ 
viewdefCustomTabularViewDefinition:>DS_Views::CoreViews::bt{ // a view definition reusing *Generic Table*definition 
renderrendering:>>asTable{ 
viewWeight:DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByExpressionView:>column{ // new custom column *Weight* 
renderrenderingasTableCell:DS_Views::CoreViews::RealCellRendering:>>DS_Views::CoreViews::asTableCell{ // specifying the table column's cell rendering as *Real* 
calc:>>getValue{ 
in:>>rowElement:KerML::Root::Element; 
ifgetWeight(rowElement) @KerML::Kernel::LiteralInteger? (getWeight(rowElement)asKerML::Kernel::LiteralInteger).valueelse 
(getWeight(rowElement)asKerML::Kernel::LiteralRational).value 
} 
calcgetWeight{ 
ine:KerML::Root::Element; 
(((e.ownedElementasSysML::Systems::AttributeUsage)->ControlFunctions::select{ 
inee; 
(eeasKerML::Root::Element).name=="weight" 
}asSysML::Systems::AttributeUsage).ownedRelationshipasKerML::Kernel::FeatureValue).value 
} 
} 
} 
} 
} 
}

##### Modifying table columns

###### Modifying inherited table columns

The table columns that are inherited from the standard predefined tabular view definitions are indicated in the [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Tabular views' space=''] table.

To modify inherited table columns

1. To modify an inherited column, redefine the needed column. In its body, modify the column as needed (e.g., hide columns, redefine attributes).
2. Click the Synchronize button.

// a view defined by a predefined tabular view:

package'Custom Tabular View Definitions'{ 
viewdefCustomTabularViewDefinition:>DS_Views::TabularViews::gt{ 
renderrendering:>>asTable{ 
view:>>'Qualified Name'; // redefining an inherited column 
} 
} 
}

###### Hiding table columns

To hide table columns

1. Within the body of the table renderer, declare a view, redefine the column you want to hide from the diagrammatic representation of the view, and set its multiplicity to zero. The table columns that are inherited from the standard predefined tabular view definitions are indicated in the [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Tabular views' space=''] table.
2. Click the Synchronize button.

// a view defined by a predefined tabular view:

package'Custom Tabular View Definitions'{ 
viewdefCustomTabularViewDefinition:>DS_Views::TabularViews::gt{ 
renderrendering:>>asTable{ 
view:>>Owner[0]; // view redefines *Declared Short Name***inherited via *Generic Table,*specifying the redefining column's multiplicity to zero to hide it 
} 
} 
}

##### Modifying table column attributes

###### Modifying table column attributes

To modify table column attributes

1. Within the column view's body, redefine the needed attribute and set its value. Column attributesTable column attributes predefined in*DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnView*are:attributeisMultiline[0..1] :Boolean; // specify whether single-valued string cells should be displayed in a multiline format.attributepinning:ColumnPinning[0..1]; // allows you to pin the column to the left or right side of the table. Available values: *left/right*.attributesorting:ColumnSorting[0..1]; // allows you to sort table rows in ascending or descending order. Available values: *asc/desc*.attributesortingOrder:Integer[0..1]; // allows you to specify the sorting order priority for the columns with the *sorting*attribute. The table rows are ordered for all columns based on the order specified using this attribute, e.g., a column with *sortingOrder* set to 0 will take the highest priority.attributewidth:Integer[0..1]; // allows you to specify the column width. The integer value is interpreted in pixels. 
[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Tabular view columns' space='']>]]>
2. Click the Synchronize button.

package'Custom Tabular View Definitions'{ 
viewdefCustomTabularViewDefinition:>DS_Views::TabularViews::gt{ 
renderrendering:>>asTable{ 
view:>>'Qualified Name'{ 
attribute:>>sortingdefaultsorting::desc; // specifying the sorting direction (sorted in descending order) 
attribute:>>sortingOrderdefault2; // specifying the sorting order priority for the column (2 - secondary priority) 
attribute:>>isMultilinedefaulttrue; // setting multiline to true to wrap a long qualified name 
attribute:>>widthdefault200; // specifying the column width 
} 
view:>>'Declared Short Name'{ 
attribute:>>sortingdefaultsorting::asc;// specifying the sorting direction (sorted in ascending order) 
attribute:>>sortingOrderdefault1; // specifying the sorting order priority for the column (1 - primary priority) 
attribute:>>pinningdefaultpinning::left; // pinning the column to the table's left side 
} 
} 
} 
}

##### Managing table elements display mode

The table elements' display mode allows you to specify how the exposed elements should be displayed in the table.For more information, see the [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Displaying elements in tabular views' space=''] page.

| Textual notation | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Attribute DS_Views::CoreViews::'Base Table'::isHierarchicalattribute :>> isHierarchical default true; | Shows each element with all of its owners (direct, indirect, and common).Groups elements under common owners, including those higher up in the ownership hierarchy. |
| Attributes DS_Views::CoreViews::'Base Table'::isCompact and isHierarchicalattribute :>> isHierarchical default true;attribute :>> isCompact default true; | Shows each element with its direct owners.Groups elements by their common owners when multiple elements share the same one. The omitted indirect owners are part of the common owner path's qualified name, e.g., indirectOwner::commonOwner. Omits indirect owners higher in the hierarchy. |
| The attributes isHierarchical and isCompact are undefined or set to false.attribute :>> isHierarchical default false;attribute :>> isCompact default false; | Displays the exposed elements as a plain list. |

###### Managing table elements display mode

To manage table elements' display mode

1. Within the body of a view definition, do one of the following:
  1. To set the table elements' display mode to Complete Tree :
    1. Declare an attribute redefining the *isHierarchical* attribute and set the default value to true .
  2. To set the table elements' display mode to Compact Tree :
    1. Declare an attribute redefining the *isHierarchical* attribute and an attribute redefining the *isCompact* attribute, and set their default values to true .
  3. To set the table elements' display mode to List , do any of the following:
    1. Set the default value for the attribute redefining the isHierarchical or isCompact attribute to false .
    2. Delete the attributes redefining the isHierarchical or isCompact attributes.
2. Click the Synchronize button.

If *isHierarchical*is set to *true,*but *isCompact*is set to *false* or is unspecified, the table's display mode is set to **Complete Tree**.

package'Custom Tabular View Definitions'{ 
viewdefCustomTabularViewDefinition:>DS_Views::TabularViews::gt{

// sets the table's display mode to 'Compact Tree': 
attribute:>>isHierarchicaldefaulttrue; 
attribute:>>isCompactdefaulttrue; 
} 
}

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button. Proceed to <ac:link ac:anchor="Adding table columns"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[add table columns]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="954b0db7-4aeb-4978-8a86-cfa4c049770e"><ac:rich-text-body><p>The new view definition becomes available <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">in the<span> </span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Custom View Creation dialog" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[View Creation dialog/submenu]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link> once you:</span></p><ol><li data-uuid="a81cff66-3548-4f00-a9d1-d81c7519d45f"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Custom View Creation dialog" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Customize or create a View Creation dialog customization]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>.</span></li><li data-uuid="fb8b9295-e44e-4d65-a5fd-5f1bf61d5122"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><ac:link ac:anchor="Creating view templates for custom templated view creation commands"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Creating View Creation dialog" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Create a view template for a custom templated command]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>. <br /></span></li><li data-uuid="f82c0753-fcb6-41ee-8cf6-ad4574d67828"><ac:link ac:anchor="Adding view creation commands to the View Creation dialog/submenu command categories"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Creating View Creation dialog" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Add the custom templated command to the View Creation dialog/submenu]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>.  </li></ol></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="07e6f2c7-3e19-46e3-a9ac-070c78967525"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// ---------- view definitions</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// a new view definition created from scratch:</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'System Behavior Table'</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::bt</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {<br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">   </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">render</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">rendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> asNewTable1</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">asTable;<br /></span></u><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">}</span></u></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// a new view definition created by reusing a predefined view definition <em>Generic Table</em>:</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'System Components Taxonomy Table'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::TabularViews</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">::gt</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">   </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">render</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">rendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> asN</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">ewTable2</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">asTable;</span></u></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">}</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// a new view definition created by reusing a custom-created view definition 'System Behavior Table':</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Variant Table'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'System Behavior Table'</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">   </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">render</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">rendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> asN</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">ewTable3</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt;&gt; <u>asN<span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">ewTable1</span></u></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">;</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">  </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// <em>asNewTable3 </em>redefines the <em>'System Behavior Table'</em> view definition's <em>asNewTable1</em> rendering, which itself redefines the <em>Base Table </em>view definition's <em>asTable</em> rendering  </span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h3>Adding table columns</h3><p>For more information, see the <span><ac:link ac:anchor="Column kinds"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Tabular view columns" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Column kinds]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link> table on the <span><ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Tabular view columns" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Tabular view columns]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link> page</span>.</span></p><h4>Adding table columns by feature</h4><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="10c11bb2-2049-409d-98aa-88a5d0675aba"><ac:rich-text-body><p>If you need to modify inherited columns by feature instead of creating new ones, see the <ac:link ac:anchor="Modifying inherited table columns" /> procedure.</p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p>To add table columns by feature </p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="81d6a1d6-8840-461a-9e11-8edc03fd59dd"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Within the body of the renderer, declare a view, specify the column name, define it by <em>DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByFeatureView</em>, and subset <em>column</em>. </span></li><li data-uuid="0b5d82f5-e73d-49c1-89c7-90f9ce6375d6"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Within the column view's body, declare <em>ref item</em>, redefine <em>columnFeature</em>, and specify the expression for the targeted meta-feature or user-defined feature. </span></li><li data-uuid="3cd690a2-75c1-4c0b-b6be-91ecb44bc90f"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="section" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="91cbdd4d-8a2c-472d-906f-988320494c4f"><ac:rich-text-body><ac:structured-macro ac:name="column" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="522adfe8-5684-4699-8e4c-426a6b1944bc"><ac:parameter ac:name="width">50%</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="0d2e8b94-f297-449d-94aa-94c0a8d7df35"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Targeting meta-features</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Custom Tabular View Definitions'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomTabularViewDefinition</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::bt</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> { <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// a view reusing <em>Base Table</em>, which does not have any columns to be inherited from</span></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">render</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">rendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">asTable</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">'Declared Name'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByFeatureView</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">column</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> { <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// new column</span></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">ref</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">item</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">columnFeature</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">declaredName</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">meta</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">KerML::Core::Feature</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><u>;</u> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// targets <em>Declared Name</em></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">'Declared Short Name'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByFeatureView</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">column</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> { <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// new column</span></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">ref</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">item</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">columnFeature</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">declaredShortName</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">meta</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">KerML::Core::Feature</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// targets <em>Declared Short Name</em></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">Documentation</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByFeatureView</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">column</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> { <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// new column</span></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">ref</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">item</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">columnFeature</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">documentation</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">meta</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">KerML::Core::Feature</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// targets <em>Documentation</em></span></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">'Qualified Name'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByFeatureView</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">column</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> { <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// new column</span></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">ref</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">item</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">columnFeature</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">qualifiedName</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">meta</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">KerML::Core::Feature</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;<span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// targets <em>Qualified Name</em></span></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">Owner</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByFeatureView</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">column</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> { <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// new column</span></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">ref</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">item</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">columnFeature</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">owner</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">meta</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">KerML::Core::Feature</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// targets <em>Owner</em></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">}</span></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="expand" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="b9fc132d-e9d2-4121-bdd4-98f0433d70cd"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Alternative notation</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="55e92dd5-8bf9-425d-8227-76ad3200dfd0"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// the following expressions are equivalent:</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">ref</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">item</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">columnFeature</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">declaredShortName</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">meta</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">KerML::Core::Feature</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">; </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">ref</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">item</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">columnFeature</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">declaredShortName</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">.</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">metadata as <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">KerML::Core::Feature</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><br /></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><ac:structured-macro ac:name="column" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="618606a3-9dab-44d7-b902-eb6c43534a22"><ac:parameter ac:name="width">50%</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="21066215-62fd-4fb3-9b13-d034efab5596"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Targeting user-defined features</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">SecurityStructure</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">private</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">import</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">metadata</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">Approval</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {  </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// custom metadata definition</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">approved</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">Boolean</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">approver</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">String</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    }<br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">SecurityDesign</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {  </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// element with applied custom metadata</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        @</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">Approval</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">           :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">approved</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">true</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">           :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">approver</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);">&quot;John Smith&quot;</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">}</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Custom Tabular View Definitions'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomTabularViewDefinition</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::bt</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">render</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">rendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">asTable</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByFeatureView</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">column</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {<span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// new column</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">ref</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">item</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">columnFeature</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">SecurityStructure::Approval::approved</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">.</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">metadata</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// targets the value of the 'approved' attribute of the custom metadata 'Approval'</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByFeatureView</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">column</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {<span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// new column</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">ref</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">item</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">columnFeature</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">SecurityStructure::Approval::approver</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">.</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">metadata</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// targets the value of the 'approver' attribute of the custom metadata 'Approval'</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><br /></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4 style="text-align: center;"><ac:image ac:align="center"><ri:attachment ri:filename="Enhanced ColumnByFeatureView Columns.png" /></ac:image></h4><h4>Adding table columns by expression </h4><p>To add table columns by expression </p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="aa44150e-452e-4030-ba68-5f9187a4ef81"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Within the body of the renderer, declare a view, specify the element name, define it by <em>DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByExpressionView</em>, and subset <em>column</em>. </span></li><li data-uuid="2a276ca4-a9ca-44e2-a4f9-3d4e36b407bf"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Within the column view's body, d</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">eclare<span> </span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">the keywords<span> </span><em>render rendering</em>, specify the name for the element, define it by the needed cell rendering definition, and redefine <em>DS_Views::CoreViews::asTableCell</em>.</span></span><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="a7d2b960-d8ba-4118-90c0-ea9614b0f73f"><ac:rich-text-body><ul><li>If you do not define <em>asTableCell</em> by a cell rendering definition, it is considered as defined by the <em>StringCellRendering </em>cell rendering definition by default.</li><li>The available table cell rendering can be found in the <em>CoreViews</em> package. </li></ul><ac:structured-macro ac:name="expand" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="de900749-4699-4b89-88bc-cd1f61a6e481"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Click here to view them</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="0281730f-df5d-4c82-8975-144ed9c2b265"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">rendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">BooleanCellRendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; TableCellRendering;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">rendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">ElementCellRendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; TableCellRendering;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">rendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">EnumCellRendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; TableCellRendering;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">rendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">IntegerCellRendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; TableCellRendering;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">rendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">MetaobjectCellRendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; TableCellRendering;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">rendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">RealCellRendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; TableCellRendering;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">rendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">StringCellRendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; TableCellRendering;</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">rendering</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">TableCellRendering</span> {<br />        <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">calc</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">getValue</span> { <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">in</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">rowElement</span> [<span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">0</span>.<span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">.1</span>] : Metaobjects::Metaobject; }<br />        <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">isMultiValued</span> [<span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">0</span>.<span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">.1</span>] : ScalarValues::Boolean;<br />    }</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><br /></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></li><li data-uuid="5183cba2-3334-48fa-b1b0-75af371a437d"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Within the body of the rendering, declare a calculation and redefine <em>getValue</em>. Specify the <em>in</em> direction, redefine the <em>rowElement</em>. Specify the needed expression. See the example below.</span></li><li data-uuid="f27d1f59-b88e-438d-b6f8-1d2f730b70ee"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="6d95d162-e50b-4052-abe7-1bd7d83f4104"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Custom Tabular View Definitions'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomTabularViewDefinition</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::bt</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> { <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// a view definition reusing <em>Generic Table </em>definition</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">render</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">rendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">asTable</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">Weight</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::ColumnByExpressionView</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">column</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> { <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// new custom column <em>Weight</em></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">render</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">rendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">asTableCell</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::RealCellRendering</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">DS_Views::CoreViews::asTableCell</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> { <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// specifying the table column's cell rendering as <em>Real</em></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">calc</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">getValue</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">in</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; (</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">getWeight</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">(</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">rowElement</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">) </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">as</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">KerML::Kernel::LiteralInteger</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">).</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">value</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">else</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                                (</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">getWeight</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">(</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">rowElement</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">) </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">KerML::Kernel::LiteralRational</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">).</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">value</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                    }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">calc</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">getWeight</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">in</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">e</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">KerML::Root::Element</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                        (((</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">e</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">.</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">ownedElement</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">as</span><span /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                            </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">in</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">SysML::Systems::AttributeUsage</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">).</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">ownedRelationship</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span
